name: Action Chase Sequence
description: High-energy chase through city streets — motion quality and dynamic camera are critical.

shot.description: A figure sprints through a rain-soaked alley, vaulting over crates. Camera follows in a handheld tracking shot.
shot.prompt: Tracking shot of a man running through a dark rainy alley, jumping over obstacles, handheld camera shake, cinematic motion blur, action movie style

notes: Should favor providers with strong motion quality and camera control (google, luma). Long duration matters.
